commit_scope: Add a Form-native Hati-OS target and distribution catalog for macOS arm64 and Android arm64, including per-OS protocol implementation rows and hati.earth native binary download coordinates.

local_validation.notes: hati-os-targets-band returns 255 across Go/Rust/TS, proving macOS arm64 and Android arm64 target rows, OS-specific implementation rows, and hati.earth download coordinates.

deploy_validation.summary: The release URLs are now native catalog coordinates. Publishing actual binaries, checksums, source maps, and lane receipts to hati.earth remains the next release step.

phase_gate.gate: macOS and Android Hati-OS targets are discoverable from Form, with implementation rows and hati.earth binary coordinates.
phase_gate.next: Wire the release build to publish the macOS tarball and Android APK at the catalog URLs, with sha256 files, source-map receipts, and per-target physical-lane summary JSON.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Cells and recipes can discover per-host Hati-OS targets and download coordinates for macOS arm64 and Android arm64 instead of assuming a single host implementation.
test_flows: Hati OS targets band proves two target rows and two artifact rows.
Hati OS targets band proves macOS process/usage implementation rows.
Hati OS targets band proves Android sensor/GPS implementation row.
Hati OS targets band proves hati.earth macOS and Android artifact URLs.
e2e_validation.summary: The native catalog now separates Form semantics from OS-specific implementation and names hati.earth as the binary distribution door. Actual artifact publishing remains explicit release work.
